连续性锁定
保持同一个未来建筑文明数据办公室，同一个主人公，同一个老板，同一张桌子，同一组蓝色建筑扫描屏幕，同一个窗外城市背景。不得更换办公室、人物、服装、镜头角度。
保持同一个未来建筑文明数据办公室、同一个主人公、同一个老板、同一张桌子、同一组蓝色建筑扫描屏幕、同一个窗外城市背景。承接上一镜最后一秒的屏幕异常闪烁。不得更换办公室、人物、服装、镜头角度。
第一人称视角从昏迷中缓慢苏醒，眼皮半睁半闭，模糊失焦，耳鸣。镜头静止数秒后逐渐恢复聚焦。随后主人公缓慢抬起头，从地面视角看向远方。随着视线抬升，越来越多毁灭后的未来城市进入画面。断裂摩天大楼、燃烧废墟、浓烟、崩塌建筑逐渐显现。主人公被眼前景象震撼，动作停滞，长时间凝视整个末日城市。

即梦一镜到底prompt：

黑屏开始。强烈耳鸣、沉重呼吸、远处建筑坍塌声与金属摩擦声。第一人称视角。眼皮半睁半闭，黑色眼皮阴影遮挡视野。第一次睁眼仅睁开一半又无力闭合，随后缓慢重新睁开。画面逐渐显现，模糊失焦，轻微重影，焦点不断恢复。最终聚焦到废墟中的天空视角。一镜到底，真实人类昏迷后苏醒效果。

保持同一个主人公、同一个废墟场景、同一个硬盘。

电子启动音响起。

第一人称视角保持不变。主人公用双手撑住地面缓慢起身，镜头从仰躺视角逐渐抬升至坐姿视角。视线从天空转向前方废墟。越来越多毁灭后的城市进入视野。真实人体运动轨迹，轻微晃动与呼吸感，一镜到底。

即梦提示词：

主体：@97522b4e-4062-4154-a28e-dd62e3916928中穿灰棕色夹克的年轻白人男性；@688064d0-f19f-422e-bb66-b379d2e6c83f中印有“CIVILIZATION ARCHIVE”字样的银色金属外壳移动硬盘。

场景：@2f249ccf-d4b0-46ee-ae02-26d673c45956中的废墟城市，极浅景深下完全虚化，环境持续有轻微风声和电流滋滋声。

风格：超特写微距，浅景深，冷调低饱和，末世废土氛围，带蓝色科技光效，画面质感粗糙。

音乐：缓慢无明确节拍的氛围音乐，以深沉持续的合成器低音铺底，营造悬疑广阔略带忧郁的氛围。

情节： 中景变近景特写，主人公坐在废墟中，右手撑地时感受到掌下异物，低头查看，半埋在灰尘中的硬盘显露。主人公右手拾起硬盘，镜头聚焦特写，他用左手拇指擦去表面灰尘，磨损的金属外壳逐渐露出，“CIVILIZATION ARCHIVE”字样显现。 切换至第三人称中近景，主人公站立于废墟边缘，双手握着硬盘，神情从疑惑逐渐变为震惊。周围环境声音减弱只剩风声，主人公缓缓将拇指移到硬盘侧面的启动按钮，短暂停顿后坚定按下。低沉电子启动音响起，硬盘边缘蓝色指示灯瞬间亮起，蓝色能量光沿金属边缘快速扩散，一道明亮蓝色扫描光从左至右高速扫过整个硬盘表面，蓝光映亮主人公的脸庞，他震惊地注视着手中的硬盘。画面结束于扫描完成瞬间，准备衔接下一段全息系统启动。

背景
室内是冷色未来办公室，灰色办公桌，黑色网面椅，蓝色数据屏幕，全息建筑模型，文件和线缆；窗外城市完整平静，远处乌云慢慢聚集。
窗外城市，远处乌云加深，慢慢出现火光。

总结运镜：黑屏开始。没有画面。只听见强烈耳鸣、沉重呼吸、远处建筑坍塌的低沉轰鸣、金属结构扭曲摩擦声、呼啸风声与零星爆炸声。模拟真实人类从昏迷中逐渐苏醒。第一人称视角（POV），镜头就是主人公的眼睛。眼皮半睁半闭，黑色眼皮阴影遮挡大部分视野。第一次睁眼只睁开一半，画面短暂出现模糊光线，随后又无力闭合四分之一。停顿片刻后，眼皮缓慢重新睁开，视野逐渐变亮，画面模糊失焦，存在轻微重影，焦点不断漂移和调整。呼吸声近距离可闻，画面随着呼吸产生轻微起伏。最终焦点逐渐恢复，显现出仰躺在废墟中的天空视角：浓密黑烟覆盖天空，灰烬和火星缓慢飘落，几根扭曲断裂的钢筋从画面两侧伸向天空，破碎混凝土和建筑残骸位于视野边缘。整体感觉像刚从剧烈撞击后的昏迷中恢复意识，震惊、茫然、迟钝、难以置信。

镜头保持第一人称视角，一镜到底，不切镜头。主人公开始艰难起身，仿佛用双手撑住地面。镜头先轻微左右晃动，再缓慢向前上方运动。动作迟缓、沉重、真实，像身体还没有完全恢复控制。视线逐渐脱离天空，原本画面中的钢筋、浓烟和灰烬向画面上方滑出。镜头高度持续升高，从仰躺视角自然过渡到半坐起视角，再进入坐姿视角。过程中保留轻微头晕感、呼吸晃动和不稳定重心，不要平滑得像机械镜头。随着视线抬高，画面前景逐渐出现碎裂柏油路、破碎混凝土、扭曲钢筋、散落玻璃、灰尘覆盖的破损车辆。中景出现坍塌高架桥、断裂建筑外墙、裸露钢结构和正在燃烧的建筑残骸。远处未来城市轮廓逐渐显现，越来越多倒塌倾斜的摩天大楼进入视野，建筑之间升起浓烟，橙红火光在烟雾中闪烁。镜头最终停在坐姿高度，主人公静止凝视前方，没有对白，没有大幅动作，只剩震惊和意识到灾难真实发生后的僵住感。

保持同一个末日废墟场景、同一个主人公、同一个城市布局和连续时间。一镜到底。坐起后，镜头仍保持主人公第一人称视角，正对前方废墟城市。短暂停顿后，镜头开始非常缓慢地向后移动，仿佛从主人公双眼位置逐渐脱离。这个运动必须自然、连续、平稳，不能突然跳转，不能硬切。镜头从眼睛位置向后穿出头部，完成从第一人称视角到第三人称背影视角的自然过渡。随着镜头后退，主人公后脑逐渐进入画面，随后肩膀和完整背影逐渐显现。主人公背对镜头，身体静止，略微僵硬，仍然看向远处毁灭城市。这个瞬间要明确表达：刚才观众看到的一切都来自主人公的眼睛视角。禁止出现主人公正脸，禁止突然切到第三人称，禁止出现陌生人物替代主人公。

镜头从主人公双眼位置缓慢向后穿出头部，从第一人称视角自然过渡到第三人称背影视角。主人公后脑逐渐进入画面。随后露出完整背影。运动路线是向后、向上、轻微俯视，像无人机从人物身后平稳拉远升空。从近景逐渐变为中景，人物从画面主体变成画面下方的背影；再从中景变为远景，人物比例持续缩小。随着镜头不断后撤升高，视野范围逐渐扩大，更多毁灭后的城市区域进入画面：坍塌高楼、断裂道路、破碎桥梁、燃烧街区、废弃车辆、建筑残骸、滚动浓烟和漂浮灰烬逐渐铺满画面。城市尺度不断扩大，废墟从局部街区扩展为整座未来城市。镜头继续平稳升高，最终形成高空俯瞰视角，完整展现毁灭后的未来城市全貌。主人公只保留为画面下部很小的背影或黑色人影，站在废墟边缘不动。全程电影级写实风格，灾难电影质感，真实摄影机轨迹，缓慢、庄重、连续的长镜头运镜，体积烟雾，真实火光，灰暗天空，强烈尺度感，末日氛围，8K超清。无跳切、无突然加速、无明显抖动、无场景切换、无人物变形、无身份变化。
光影
冷光灯和蓝色屏幕光为主，头顶硬光，冷峻高对比，灯光轻微闪烁，窗外有极弱的冷灰色风暴光。
冷白荧光灯和蓝色屏幕光为基础。红色警示灯开始旋转，红光一下一下扫过桌面、人物脸部和玻璃窗。光影从冷蓝办公感变成红蓝交替的紧急状态

镜头从主人公双眼位置缓慢向后穿出头部，从第一人称视角自然过渡到第三人称背影视角。主人公后脑逐渐进入画面。随后露出完整背影。@c92d274c-8416-46ff-b4db-76cfe8e17d63运动路线是向后、向上、轻微俯视，像无人机从人物身后平稳拉远升空。从近景逐渐变为中景，人物从画面主体变成画面下方的背影；再从中景变为远景，人物比例持续缩小。@d330ffae-5396-4e0d-99cc-8b4d34caaf0c随着镜头不断后撤升高，视野范围逐渐扩大，更多毁灭后的城市区域进入画面：坍塌高楼、断裂道路、破碎桥梁、燃烧街区、废弃车辆、建筑残骸、滚动浓烟和漂浮灰烬逐渐铺满画面。城市尺度不断扩大，废墟从局部街区扩展为整座未来城市。镜头继续平稳升高，最终形成高空俯瞰视角，完整展现毁灭后的未来城市全貌。主人公只保留为画面下部很小的背影或黑色人影，站在废墟边缘不动。全程电影级写实风格，灾难电影质感，真实摄影机轨迹，缓慢、庄重、连续的长镜头运镜，体积烟雾，真实火光，灰暗天空，强烈尺度感，末日氛围，8K超清。无跳切、无突然加速、无明显抖动、无场景切换、无人物变形、无身份变化、不要提前切换视角。
时间变化/剧情节拍
0-5秒：主人公重复扫描建筑数据，老板在身后无声施压，办公室平静压抑。5-6秒：窗外远处乌云加深，极轻微闪电反射在玻璃上，无人反应。6-7秒：主屏幕突然闪烁一次，红色警告边框刚开始出现但文字不可读，天花板警示灯只发出一次轻微咔哒声但不亮起。
0-2秒：红色警告界面弹出，警示灯开始旋转。2-4秒：广播声响起，老板和主人公疑惑听广播。4-6秒：主人公准备起身撤离，老板重新指向上传进度条，说出“先把数据上传，上传完再撤离”。
结尾衔接
本镜在警报真正响起前一瞬间切断。下一镜才出现红色警示灯闪烁、警报声、撤离通知。但本镜不得出现完整警报、红灯闪烁、撤离、人群奔跑。
环境音
持续音：冷光灯电流声、键盘声、扫描仪低鸣。突发音：最后一秒有一次轻微电流异常声和警示灯机械咔哒声。音量变化：最后半秒突然变安静后切断。
持续音：警报声、荧光灯电流声、屏幕故障声、扫描仪低鸣。突发音：红色警报启动声、广播系统接通声。音量变化：警报从突然刺耳开始，随后广播声音压过办公室环境声。
对话
无对白。无字幕。无旁白。
广播声：“全球紧急通知。灭绝级撞击事件已确认。预计撞击时间：请所有人员尽快进行避难准备。” 老板停顿后说：“先把数据上传。上传完再撤离。” 禁止其他额外对白。
风格与质感
数字电影，写实电影感，冷色调末世科幻前兆，冰冷金属质感，蓝色屏幕光，真实办公室材料。
禁止项
对白，字幕，旁白，警报已经响起，红色警示灯已经闪烁，撤离已经开始，爆炸，火光，坠落碎片，建筑倒塌，城市毁灭，陨石可见，人群恐慌，换角度，换办公室，换人物，主人公手里没有硬盘。
明显爆炸严、重撞击灾难、陨石可见
scene

Same futuristic architectural data office, same protagonist, same boss, same rotating blue holographic building models.

Red emergency warning lights flash across the office while blue technological light illuminates the room. Alarm sirens become faster and more urgent.

The @Protagonist reaches his breaking point.

He suddenly jumps to his feet, sending his chair sliding backward. Nearby employees turn in shock.

He rushes toward the @boss, grabs him by the collar with both hands, and slams him onto the desk.

Documents, architectural drawings, and office supplies scatter across the floor.

Leaning close to the boss, he furiously yells about spending every day scanning buildings, uploading files, and collecting useless architectural data. His anger gradually turns into despair.

The office falls silent except for alarms.

The protagonist grabs the @device and raises it high, preparing to smash it down.

At that exact moment, a massive red explosion erupts outside the floor-to-ceiling windows.

A giant crimson fireball engulfs the city skyline.

Red light floods the office, overpowering the blue holographic projections. The building models flicker and distort.

A thunderous roar arrives.

The entire office shakes violently.

Papers fly through the air.

The protagonist freezes with the hard drive still raised.

The expanding red blast fills the frame.

Extreme overexposure.

Hard cut to black.

Cinematic photorealism, handheld camera, intense emotion, apocalypse atmosphere, realistic destruction, film quality.
最终 Prompt

Keep the same futuristic architectural civilization data office, the same protagonist, the same boss, the same desk, the same set of blue architectural scanning screens, and the same city background outside the window. Continue directly from the abnormal screen flicker in the final second of the previous shot. Do not change the office, characters, clothing, or camera angle.

Medium-wide shot, slightly low angle, stable camera. The camera follows the protagonist’s line of sight slightly upward, gradually pushing toward the boss and the red emergency warning light.

The protagonist’s exhausted expression instantly shifts into nervous confusion. His fingers freeze above the keyboard, while his right hand still grips the black hard drive tightly. He raises his eyes toward the alarm source above and to the side. His expression changes from impatience to confusion and tension, but he does not stand up or run away.

The boss stands behind the protagonist. At first, he stays silent for a few seconds and also looks upward toward the direction of the warning. His expression shifts from anger to brief shock. Then he suppresses his emotions, points back at the upload progress bar, and returns to a cold, forceful, bureaucratic expression.

Outside the window, the city remains visible. Dark clouds in the distance grow deeper, and faint firelight slowly begins to appear far away.

The lighting is based on cold white fluorescent lights and blue screen glow. A red emergency warning light begins to rotate, sweeping pulses of red light across the desk, the characters’ faces, and the glass window. The visual mood shifts from cold blue office lighting into an urgent red-and-blue emergency atmosphere.

0-2 seconds: A red warning interface pops up on the screen, and the emergency warning light begins rotating.
2-4 seconds: The emergency broadcast begins. The boss and the protagonist listen in confusion.
4-6 seconds: The protagonist prepares to stand up and evacuate, but the boss points back at the upload progress bar and says, “Upload the data first. Evacuate after the upload.”

Continuous sounds: alarm siren, fluorescent electrical buzzing, screen glitch sounds, low scanner hum.
Sudden sounds: red alarm activation sound, broadcast system connection sound.
Volume change: the alarm begins suddenly and harshly, then the broadcast voice rises above the office ambience.

Broadcast voice:
“Global emergency notice. Extinction-level impact event confirmed. All personnel prepare for evacuation immediately.”

After a pause, the boss says:
“Upload the data first. Evacuate after the upload.”

No extra dialogue.

Negative prompt: obvious explosion, severe impact disaster, visible meteor, major destruction, falling debris, collapsed buildings, city destroyed, panic crowd, evacuation already completed, different office, different characters, different clothing, different camera angle, protagonist without hard drive, subtitles, narration, watermark, logo.

Close-up on @Protagonist's right hand resting beside the keyboard.

The @boss turns back and going to leave.

Emergency alarms grow faster and more urgent.

His fingers slowly curl inward.

The fist tightens.

Knuckles turn white.

Veins become visible beneath the skin.

A slight tremor runs through his hand.

Years of suppressed anger are about to erupt.

Background music steadily rises.

Low-frequency tension builds.

Red warning lights flash continuously.

Blue holographic architecture continues rotating.

Cinematic photorealism.

Extreme emotional tension.

@Protagonist suddenly rises from his chair.

The chair rolls backward.

The camera follows with violent energy.

He charges toward the boss.

Grabs the boss by the collar.

Forcefully slams him against the office desk.

Folders and papers scatter everywhere.

The entire office falls silent.

Coworkers stare in shock.

Red emergency lights flash frantically.

Blue holographic building models continue rotating overhead.

@Protagonist shouts furiously:

"Scanning every day!"

"Uploading every day!"

"The world is ending!"

"Nobody cares about any of this!"

Background music surges toward its climax.

Alarm frequency accelerates continuously.

Tension escalates without pause.

Cinematic handheld camera.

Explosive emotional breakdown.

@Protagonist releases the boss.

He grabs the black civilization data hard drive@device.

Raises it high above his head.

Preparing to smash it onto the desk.

The camera freezes on the moment before impact.

Inside the office,

red emergency lights flash violently.

Their frequency reaches maximum intensity.

The blue holographic architectural models continue rotating.

But outside the windows,

an intense red glow rapidly grows brighter.

A massive red fireball erupts across the distant city.

A devastating crimson shockwave spreads across the skyline.

The entire city becomes bathed in blood-red light.

Building silhouettes begin disappearing into the explosion.

The blue technological glow inside the office is completely overwhelmed by red destruction.

The holographic building projections flicker and distort.

Alarm sirens reach maximum intensity.

Background music hits its climax.

A colossal roar consumes every sound.

Violent shaking.

Instant hard cut to black.

Photorealistic destruction.

Film-quality ending.
问题记录

镜头连续性（continuity）和时间节拍（timing beats）不严谨：

1.本来是近景镜头，新片段又是远镜头推进近。（是我未考虑到尾帧镜头大小导致错误）
2.主人公应在警报人声停了之后才准备起身，boss在人声警报声停了之后，主人公准备起身是开始说话，并慢慢转身准备离开。
3.先产生短促多次的滴滴滴刺耳的鸣笛提示引起注意，再出现人声警报，人声消失后，鸣笛依旧存在。在boss开始说话时减弱逐渐减弱音量变为背景音。

下一次修改目标

Maintain the same futuristic architectural civilization data office, the same protagonist, the same boss, the same desk, the same blue architectural scanning screens, the same rotating holographic building model, and the same city skyline outside the window. This shot begins immediately after the previous shot ends, continuing from the moment the red warning frame first appears on the monitor. Do not change the office, characters, costumes, desk layout, or scene continuity.

Camera:
Start from the same medium shot scale as the previous shot. Do NOT reset to a wider establishing shot. The camera remains stable and continuous. During the scene, the camera slowly pulls back from a medium shot into a wider full-office composition, gradually revealing more of the office environment, the red emergency lighting, and the growing threat outside the windows. Slight low-angle perspective.

Composition:
The protagonist remains seated in the foreground at the same desk. The boss stands behind him in the same position. The main monitor and upload progress bar remain visible throughout the shot. The rotating holographic architectural model remains continuously visible and rotating for the entire duration of the scene.

Protagonist:
Exhausted and emotionally drained at first. His fingers stop above the keyboard when the alarm begins. His right hand continues gripping the black hard drive tightly. He looks upward toward the source of the warning. His expression changes from annoyance to confusion, then tension. During the emergency broadcast he remains seated and listening. He does NOT attempt to stand up while the broadcast is speaking.

Boss:
Standing behind the protagonist. Initially angry and impatient. When the emergency alert begins he becomes briefly silent and looks toward the warning source. His expression shifts from irritation to temporary shock. During the broadcast he says nothing. Only after the broadcast voice completely finishes does he regain control of his emotions, return to a cold bureaucratic attitude, and point again toward the upload progress bar.

Background:
Cold futuristic office environment. Blue architectural scanning screens. Gray desk. Black mesh office chair. Office equipment, cables and documents remain unchanged. Outside the window, the city is still intact. Dark storm clouds continue gathering. A distant orange glow gradually appears and slowly grows brighter throughout the shot. The fire glow becomes noticeably larger by the end of the scene, but no visible explosion, impact event, meteor, or collapsing buildings are shown.

Lighting:

Rotating red alarm light begins sweeping across the office desks, holographic building models, and @Character's tired face. The emergency broadcast plays over the speakers. @CharacterBoss stands behind him, silent for a beat, staring at the alert screen under alternating red and blue light.

The office broadcast system crackles to life with a cold synthetic voice: "Global emergency notice." The camera slowly pushes in on @Character as the red light reflects in their exhausted eyes. The voice continues: "Extinction-level impact event confirmed." The alarm grows louder, red light spinning faster across the desk, hard drive @Device, keyboard, and holographic data projections.

@CharacterBoss slowly turns away from the emergency alert and points sharply back at the upload progress bar on @Character's monitor. @Character remains seated, stunned, hard drive in hand. Then @CharacterBoss speaks coldly, almost without emotion: "Upload the data first." A close-up on @Character's face, silent, exhausted, disbelief slowly turning into contained rage. @CharacterBoss adds: "Evacuate after the upload is complete."

final_input_output_videos.value:
Scene 1, 0-7 seconds. Vertical 9:16 photorealistic live-action film still style.

Inside a futuristic architectural data office, cold fluorescent lights flicker softly overhead. @Protagonist sits hunched at a desk, tired and bored, scanning blue holographic 3D architectural models and uploading civilization data to a database. Multiple monitors show blue architectural schematics, upload progress bars, and data panels.

The camera begins in a medium-wide shot from a slightly high angle, then slowly pushes in toward @Protagonist. Blue holographic light reflects in their tired eyes. Their typing is mechanical and repetitive. @Boss stands behind them, impatient and dissatisfied, leaning forward and watching the upload screen, but no emergency has started yet.

Through the large floor-to-ceiling windows in the background, the city skyline is calm and intact. Dark gray storm clouds slowly gather above the skyscrapers. A very faint distant lightning flash reflects on the window for a moment, subtle enough that nobody reacts.

At the end of the shot, the fluorescent lights flicker once, the holographic model stutters for a split second. At the final beat of the shot, the blue office monitors suddenly flicker violently for less than a second. A red warning frame begins to appear at the edge of the main screen, incomplete and unreadable. The ceiling alarm lights click once but do not illuminate yet. The office falls into a tense half-second of silence. @Protagonist barely notices and keeps typing. Cut immediately before the alarm starts and before any red emergency light appears.

Mood: bureaucratic pressure, meaningless routine, quiet unease, calm before catastrophe.

Lighting: cold fluorescent office lighting, blue monitor and hologram glow, subtle cool-gray storm light from the window.

Negative prompt: alarm already sounding, red emergency lights, evacuation, explosion, fireball, burning buildings, falling debris, collapsing buildings, meteor visible, destroyed city, panic crowd, people running, bright orange glow, disaster already happening, anime, cartoon, illustration, unrealistic faces, plastic skin, watermark, logo.alarm already sounding, red warning lights already flashing, readable emergency alert, evacuation already happening

Same futuristic architectural data office, same protagonist, same boss, same rotating blue holographic building models.

Red emergency warning lights flash across the office while blue technological light illuminates the room. Alarm sirens become faster and more urgent.

The @Protagonist reaches his breaking point.

He suddenly jumps to his feet, sending his chair sliding backward. Nearby employees turn in shock.

He rushes toward the @boss, grabs him by the collar with both hands, and slams him onto the desk.

Documents, architectural drawings, and office supplies scatter across the floor.

Leaning close to the boss, he furiously yells about spending every day scanning buildings, uploading files, and collecting useless architectural data. His anger gradually turns into despair.

The office falls silent except for alarms.

The protagonist grabs the @device and raises it high, preparing to smash it down.

At that exact moment, a massive red explosion erupts outside the floor-to-ceiling windows.

A giant crimson fireball engulfs the city skyline.

Red light floods the office, overpowering the blue holographic projections. The building models flicker and distort.

A thunderous roar arrives.

The entire office shakes violently.

Papers fly through the air.

The protagonist freezes with the hard drive still raised.

The expanding red blast fills the frame.

Extreme overexposure.

Hard cut to black.

Cinematic photorealism, handheld camera, intense emotion, apocalypse atmosphere, realistic destruction, film quality.
Wide establishing shot of the @ArchitectureDataOffice, cold fluorescent lights flickering overhead, rows of desks stretching into shadow, blue holographic building models rotating silently

[Shot]
Type: Overhead wide shot of the office, slowly pushing in toward the protagonist
Movement: Push-in (slow)
Speed: Normal
Focal length: 50mm standard lens

[Lighting]
Key light: Cool fluorescent office lights (ceiling lights)
Light position: Overhead (evenly distributed)
Light quality: Hard light (cool color tone)
Lighting effect: High contrast (cold blue tone)
Dynamic lighting: Fluorescent lights buzzing softly (slight flickering)

[Blocking and Composition]
Composition type: Oppressive front-low / back-high positioning
Spatial relationship: Close distance (standing behind, about 50 cm away), rear angle (the boss is behind the protagonist), top-down height difference (the boss is standing, the protagonist is sitting)
Visual focus: Protagonist centered, boss in the background

[Protagonist]@Protagonist
Expression: Tired, impatient
Action: Working with head lowered, fingers tapping on the keyboard
Body posture: Sitting, leaning forward (staring at the screen)
Hand details: Right hand holding a hard drive @Device, left hand mechanically typing (with a hollow, numb feeling), fingers stiff.
Facial muscle details: Drooping eyelids, corners of the mouth slightly turned downward

[Supporting / Opposing Character]@Boss
Expression: Stern, frowning
Action: Standing behind the protagonist, looking down at the protagonist’s screen
Body posture: Standing, pointing at the protagonist while scolding with the right hand
Hand details: Right hand pointing angrily at the holographic projection on the desk

[Character Relationship]
Distance: Close (standing behind, about 50 cm away)
Angle: Rear angle (the boss is behind the protagonist)
Height difference: Looking down (the boss is standing, the protagonist is sitting)

[Skin Texture and Appearance Details]
Skin texture: Slight dark circles under the eyes (showing fatigue), visible pores
Skin tone: Pale (from long-term indoor work)
Physiological reaction: None
Appearance details: The data collector’s uniform is neat, but slightly worn-out

[Background]@ArchitechtureOffice
Interior: Office, blue architectural scanning interface, rotating holographic model, an upload progress bar moving so slowly it feels suffocating
Outside the window: Ruined city (not shown in the first scene, to preserve suspense)
Dynamic elements: Holographic model rotating (slowly), upload progress bar (almost motionless)

[Ambient Sound]
Continuous sound: Keyboard typing (mechanical, hollow, background sound)
Volume change: Keyboard typing (soft) → alarm sound (gradually increasing)

[Dialogue]
Boss: “Why is this so slow?!”

Boss: “The latest data must be uploaded today.”
Protagonist: (Does not argue, continues scanning the architectural model)
Boss: “We’re running out of time.” (angrily accusing)
Protagonist: (Silent, with clear impatience already showing on his face)

[Ending Transition]
A red warning pop-up suddenly appears on the computer screen, and the red light reflects onto the protagonist’s face.

[Style and Texture Parameters]
Medium: 35mm film photography
Art style anchor: Post-apocalyptic sci-fi atmosphere, cool color palette
Sensory texture description: Harsh, husky light; cold metallic texture

Negative words:No obvious disasters, such as explosions or similar large-scale destruction.

黑屏开始。强烈耳鸣、沉重呼吸、远处建筑坍塌声与金属摩擦声。第一人称视角。眼皮半睁半闭，黑色眼皮阴影遮挡视野。第一次睁眼仅睁开一半又无力闭合，随后缓慢重新睁开。画面逐渐显现，模糊失焦，轻微重影，焦点不断恢复。最终聚焦到废墟中的天空视角。一镜到底，真实人类昏迷后苏醒效果。
镜头1
第一人称视角保持不变。主人公用双手撑住地面缓慢起身，镜头从仰躺视角逐渐抬升至坐姿视角。视线从天空转向前方废墟。越来越多毁灭后的城市进入视野。真实人体运动轨迹，轻微晃动与呼吸感，一镜到底。
镜头2
第一人称视角凝视废墟城市。镜头从主人公双眼位置缓慢向后穿出头部，自然脱离身体。后脑逐渐进入画面，随后露出完整背影。平滑过渡到第三人称背影视角。一镜到底，无切镜头。
镜头3
保持同一主人公与同一城市布局。镜头持续向后平稳移动，同时缓慢向斜上方升高。从中景逐渐变为远景。城市尺度不断扩大。越来越多毁灭后的建筑进入画面。主人公比例持续缩小。最终形成高空俯瞰视角，完整展现毁灭后的未来城市全貌。电影级无人机运镜。
镜头4

Extreme close-up / macro cinematography, shallow depth of field, cool-toned and low saturation, post-apocalyptic wasteland atmosphere, with blue technological light effects and a rough, gritty visual texture.
Slow ambient music with no clear beat, built on deep, sustained synthesizer bass, creating a mysterious, vast, and slightly melancholic mood.

The shot moves from a medium shot into a close-up. The protagonist is sitting in the ruins. As he supports himself with his right hand on the ground, he feels an unusual object beneath his palm and looks down. A hard drive, half-buried in dust, is revealed.

He picks up the hard drive with his right hand. The camera shifts to a close-up as he wipes dust from its surface with his left thumb. The worn metallic shell gradually becomes visible, and the words “CIVILIZATION ARCHIVE” appear.

Cut to a third-person medium close shot. The protagonist stands at the edge of the ruins, holding the hard drive with both hands. His expression shifts from confusion to shock. The surrounding environmental sounds fade, leaving only the wind.
He slowly moves his thumb toward the power button on the side of the hard drive. After a brief pause, he presses it firmly.

A low electronic startup sound begins. Instantly, a blue indicator light along the edge of the hard drive turns on. Blue energy light rapidly spreads along the metal edges, and a bright blue scanning beam sweeps quickly across the entire surface of the hard drive from left to right. The blue glow illuminates the protagonist’s face as he stares at the device in shock.
The scene ends the moment the scan is completed, setting up the next sequence in which the holographic system activates.
This is Scene S3-2: Activating the Hard Drive.
